headline: Jurgen Klopp
body: Jurgen Klopp will meet with DFB officials in New York this weekend to continue negotiations over becoming Germany’s next head coach. Pep Lijnders has agreed to become his No 2 if an agreement is reached between Klopp and DFB. Story with SebSB nytimes.com/athletic/7427773… Link Jurgen Klopp to meet German FA with talks to become Julian Nagelsmann successor Pep Lijnders, who was Klopp’s assistant at Liverpool and has left Manchester City, has provisionally agreed to become his No. 2 in the role. nytimes.com
raw_text:
Jurgen Klopp will meet with DFB officials in New York this weekend to continue negotiations over becoming Germany’s next head coach. 
Pep Lijnders has agreed to become his No 2 if an agreement is reached between Klopp and DFB. 

Story with @SebSB 

nytimes.com/athletic/7427773…

Link



Jurgen Klopp to meet German FA with talks to become Julian Nagelsmann successor

Pep Lijnders, who was Klopp’s assistant at Liverpool and has left Manchester City, has provisionally agreed to become his No. 2 in the role.
nytimes.com
